name: flareThenFade
description: All 6 layers ramp up exponentially (×5/4 per tick, floor 5/255, saturation at PWM 204) over 25 ticks, then exponential decay (×768/800) until all-zero. Mirrors firmware case 0x02.

tracks._comment: Phase 1 — 25-tick exponential ramp on all 6 layers.
Phase 2 — exponential decay over 200 ticks (worst-case budget).
